case_title: MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER VS. LOREN M MERLIN

docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MERLIN, LOREN M
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MERLIN, LOREN M
CHALLENGES TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT MERLIN, LOREN M
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,609.42 FILED BY RAIFSNIDER, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MERLIN, LOREN M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$125.00); [SERVICE WAS MADE WITH SC-100 ATTACHMENT OF EXHIBITS 1 THRU 8] SERVED FEB-15-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MERLIN, LOREN M
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT FOR HEARING - RECEIVED WITH PROOF OF SERVICE FOR SC-100 CLAIM [DEFENDANT LOREN M MERLIN TO APPEAR BY ZOOM]; {HEARING: APR-03-2024 AT 8:30AM}
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY RAIFSNIDER, MICHAEL MERLIN, LOREN M

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOREN M. MERLIN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. SAN FRANCISCO WAS DETERMINED TO BE THE INPROPER VENUE PER CCP 395. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
